mentions.note: CEO Steve Caple (Kellogg turnaround wizard) rebuilding lost brands; 6.85% yield. Faith-based on Caple's execution post-Kellogg breakup success.

CEO Cahillane (Kellogg turnaround architect) proving Kraft Heinz playbook. Invested behind winning brands; share gains accelerating (54% shelf space). Innovation (Power Mac) and NFL partnership gaining traction. Stock up 2% on beat.
Down; packaged food weakness; inflation concerns weighing on group.
Food giant rallying on AI productivity story despite GLP-1 demand risk; solid earnings and buyback; benefiting from diversification rotation.

Steve Kolane (Kellogg breakup CEO) started Jan 1, 2026; split planned H2 2026; market ignoring potential (like Kellogg pre-split); Cramer doubts appetite for breakup but credits Kolane as right guy given track record; calls for action on CPG sector.
